title: What is Orbital AMM?
content: Orbital AMM is a novel automated market maker design that generalizes concentrated liquidity to any number of tokens. Reserves live on an n-dimensional sphere. Capital efficiency, stablecoins, multi-token pool, sphere invariant, concentrated liquidity, ticks, torus invariant.

title: Why Algorand?
content: Building Orbital AMM on Algorand. AVM native 512-bit math via mulw opcode, sqrt as first-class opcode, box storage for tick state, low latency finality, cost-efficient transactions. EVM comparison, Algorand Virtual Machine.

title: Quickstart
content: Get started with taurusSwap in 5 minutes. Install SDK, connect to Algorand, read pool state, execute your first swap. npm install algosdk, initialize Algod client, testnet mainnet sandbox.

title: Math Overview
content: Bird's-eye view of the mathematical pipeline. Reserves on a sphere, polar decomposition, ticks as spherical caps, consolidation, torus formation. Pipeline: reserves, alpha, w component, tick boundary, torus invariant verification.

title: Sphere AMM
content: The sphere invariant is the foundation of Orbital AMM. Deriving the invariant: sum of (r - xi)^2 = r^2. Center at (r,r,...,r). Prices as partial derivatives. Instantaneous price computation, marginal exchange rates.

title: Polar Decomposition
content: Decomposing reserves into two orthogonal components: alpha (scalar projection onto equal-price axis) and w (orthogonal residual). Equal-price direction vector v = (1/sqrt(n),...). Trading moves w, alpha encodes total value.

title: Ticks and Caps
content: Ticks are spherical caps that define concentrated liquidity regions. Each tick is the intersection of the sphere with a half-space. Tick boundary hyperplane, cap radius, liquidity within a tick, tick crossing condition.

title: Consolidation
content: Consolidating multiple ticks into a single interior sphere and boundary circle. Summing liquidity contributions, effective radius, alpha_bound, s_bound calculation. Multi-tick pool state.

title: Torus Invariant
content: The master equation for multi-tick pools. r_int^2 = (alpha_int - r_int*sqrt(n))^2 + (|w| - s_bound)^2. Interior sphere, boundary subspace, simultaneous constraint satisfaction. On-chain verification.

title: Capital Efficiency
content: Orbital achieves dramatically higher capital efficiency than uniform liquidity pools. 150x efficiency multiplier for 5-token pool at 0.99 depeg threshold compared to Curve. Concentrated liquidity vs uniform liquidity, LP returns.

title: Protocol Architecture
content: Compute-off-chain, verify-on-chain pattern. SDK solves torus invariant for trade output, contract performs O(1) verification. Transaction group: ASA transfer input, app call with claimedOut, minOut slippage. Frontend SDK contract flow.

title: Smart Contract
content: Orbital AMM AVM smart contract. PyTeal or Algorand Python. Global state, box storage for ticks and tokens. swap, add_liquidity, remove_liquidity, claim_fees methods. Budget padding transactions, opcode cost.

title: State Layout
content: Global state fields: n_tokens, radius, alpha, tick_count, fee_rate. Box storage: reserves box, tick boxes, fee_growth boxes, token ASA ID mapping. Box naming conventions, encoding.

title: Swap Verification
content: How the contract verifies a swap. Reads new reserves from claimedOut, computes alpha and w, checks torus invariant, verifies output >= minOut, emits inner transaction payout. Verification steps on-chain.

title: Tick Crossing
content: When a trade exhausts the current tick's liquidity, the pool crosses to the next tick. Crossing condition: |w| exceeds tick boundary. Contract checks crossed tick boxes, updates boundary state. Multi-hop swaps.

title: Fee Accounting
content: Fee growth tracking per tick. fee_growth_inside computed from global and tick-level accumulators. LP fee claims proportional to liquidity share. Uniswap V3 fee accounting model adapted for sphere AMM.

title: Unit Scaling
content: Internal units vs display units. AMOUNT_SCALE factor converts between microunits (ASA base) and scaled internal representation. Preventing overflow in 512-bit arithmetic. Token decimals, precision.

title: SDK Overview
content: taurusSwap SDK is a TypeScript library for interacting with Orbital AMM pools. Reads pool state, computes quotes, builds transaction groups, handles unit conversions. Does not sign or send transactions.

title: Installation
content: Install taurusSwap SDK: npm install @taurusswap/sdk. Peer dependency algosdk v3.5.0+. TypeScript configuration, strict mode, moduleResolution. yarn add, package setup.

title: Reading Pool State
content: Fetch decoded pool state from Algorand. readPoolState(algodClient, poolAppId). Returns radius, n_tokens, ticks array, token ASA IDs, fee_rate. Decoding global state and box storage.

title: Quoting Swaps
content: Get a price quote before executing a swap. quoteSwap(poolState, tokenInIdx, tokenOutIdx, amountIn). Returns claimedOut, priceImpact, fee, route. Solving torus invariant client-side.

title: Executing Swaps
content: Build and submit swap transaction groups. buildSwapTxns(algodClient, poolAppId, sender, quote, minAmountOut). Sign with Pera, Defly, or any algosdk signer. atomic group, ASA transfer, app call.

title: Adding Liquidity
content: Provide liquidity to an Orbital AMM pool. buildAddLiquidityTxns, tick range selection, LP tokens minted proportional to liquidity share. Single-sided and multi-sided deposits.

title: Managing Positions
content: Track and manage LP positions. readPosition, buildRemoveLiquidityTxns, buildClaimFeesTxns. Position NFT or account-based tracking. Fee accumulation, removal, uncollected fees.

title: API Reference
content: Complete SDK API reference. readPoolState, quoteSwap, buildSwapTxns, buildAddLiquidityTxns, buildRemoveLiquidityTxns, buildClaimFeesTxns. Type definitions, PoolState, Quote, Transaction interfaces.

title: Frontend Overview
content: taurusSwap frontend is built with Next.js App Router, React, Tailwind CSS, and @txnlab/use-wallet-react. Component architecture, page structure, wallet integration, state management with Zustand.

title: Data Hooks
content: React hooks for fetching and caching pool data. usePoolState, useSwapQuote, useWalletAssets, useTokenBalances. React Query for caching, staleness, refetch. AlgodClient integration.

title: Visualizations
content: Recharts-based charts for pool analytics. BalanceHistoryChart, LiquidityDepthChart. Tick visualization, price range display, LP position chart. Responsive, animated, real-time updates.

title: Glossary
content: Key terms: AMM, sphere invariant, torus invariant, tick, cap, polar decomposition, alpha, w component, radius, concentrated liquidity, LP, ASA, AVM, claimedOut, minOut, slippage, price impact, fee growth.

title: Constants
content: Protocol constants. AMOUNT_SCALE, MAX_TOKENS, MIN_LIQUIDITY, FEE_DENOMINATOR, GLOBAL_STATE_KEYS, BOX_NAMES. Deployed app IDs for testnet and mainnet.

title: Deployed Addresses
content: Testnet and mainnet contract addresses, app IDs. USDC-USDT-USDe pool, ASA IDs for each token. Algorand testnet, mainnet deployment details.

title: Paper
content: Original Orbital AMM paper by Dave White, Dan Robinson, Ciamac Moallemi from Paradigm, June 2025. Multi-asset concentrated liquidity, sphere invariant derivation, torus invariant, capital efficiency analysis.
